SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template

Interface Column

All Known Implementing Classes:
ColumnImpl
public interface Column
Represents a column in a database table.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    foreignKey()
    Determines if the column is a foreign key.
    GenerationStrategy
    generation()
    Gets the generation strategy for the primary key.
    int
    index()
    Gets the 1-based index of the column.
    boolean
    insertable()
    Determines if the column is insertable.
    int
    keyIndex()
    The 1-based index of the key.
    Metamodel<Data,?>
    metamodel()
    Returns the metamodel for this element.
    String
    name()
    Gets the name of the column.
    boolean
    nullable()
    Determines if the column is nullable.
    boolean
    primaryKey()
    Determines if the column is a primary key.
    String
    qualifiedName(SqlDialect dialect)
    Gets the qualified name of the column including escape characters where necessary.
    boolean
    ref()
    Determines if the column is a ref column.
    Metamodel<Data,?>
    secondaryMetamodel()
    Returns the secondary metamodel associated with this element.
    String
    sequence()
    Gets the sequence name for generating the primary key, or empty if the primary key is not generated by a sequence.
    Class<?>
    type()
    Gets the type of the column.
    boolean
    updatable()
    Determines if the column is updatable.
    boolean
    version()
    Determines if the column is used for versioning.

  • Method Details

    • index

      int index()
      Gets the 1-based index of the column.
      Returns:
      the column index.

    • name

      String name()
      Gets the name of the column.
      Returns:
      the column name.

    • qualifiedName

      String qualifiedName(@Nonnull SqlDialect dialect)
      Gets the qualified name of the column including escape characters where necessary.
      Parameters:
      dialect - the SQL dialect.
      Returns:
      the qualified column name.

    • type

      Class<?> type()
      Gets the type of the column.
      Returns:
      the type of the column.

    • primaryKey

      boolean primaryKey()
      Determines if the column is a primary key.
      Returns:
      true if it is a primary key, false otherwise.

    • generation

      GenerationStrategy generation()
      Gets the generation strategy for the primary key.
      Returns:
      the generation strategy for the primary key.

    • sequence

      String sequence()
      Gets the sequence name for generating the primary key, or empty if the primary key is not generated by a sequence.
      Returns:
      the sequence name for generating the primary key.

    • foreignKey

      boolean foreignKey()
      Determines if the column is a foreign key.
      Returns:
      true if it is a foreign key, false otherwise.

    • keyIndex

      int keyIndex()
      The 1-based index of the key.
      Returns:
      the 1-based index of the key.

    • nullable

      boolean nullable()
      Determines if the column is nullable.
      Returns:
      true if the column can be null, false otherwise.

    • insertable

      boolean insertable()
      Determines if the column is insertable.
      Returns:
      true if the column can be inserted, false otherwise.

    • updatable

      boolean updatable()
      Determines if the column is updatable.
      Returns:
      true if the column can be updated, false otherwise.

    • version

      boolean version()
      Determines if the column is used for versioning.
      Returns:
      true if it is a version column, false otherwise.

    • ref

      boolean ref()
      Determines if the column is a ref column.
      Returns:
      if the column is a ref column, false otherwise.

    • metamodel

      Metamodel<Data,?> metamodel()
      Returns the metamodel for this element.

      In case of a foreign key relationship, this metamodel represents the foreign key column on the parent entity. For non-foreign relationships, this is the only metamodel that applies.

      Returns:
      the metamodel for this element.
      Since:
      1.7

    • secondaryMetamodel

      Metamodel<Data,?> secondaryMetamodel()
      Returns the secondary metamodel associated with this element.

      This metamodel is only present for foreign key relationships and represents the primary key of the referenced (foreign) entity. For all other cases, this method returns null.

      Returns:
      the metamodel of the referenced entity's primary key, or null if this element does not represent a foreign relationship.
      Since:
      1.8
